docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-30-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUSAEED ALKHALDI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEN YEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
